message:
feat(tui): add neighborhood context to graph list nodes

Graph list nodes now show:
- Blocker/dependent indicators (⊘N blocked, ↓N unblocks)
- Cycle membership marker (⟳) for nodes in dependency cycles
- Articulation point marker (◆) for structural bridge nodes

These signals help operators visually identify graph topology features
(bottlenecks, cycles, bridges) without switching to the detail pane.

Addresses bd-2bpl.3.6.8.1 (graph neighborhood visualization).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
